name: Blood Soaked Bastard!
short_description: Blood Soaked Bastard! Is an RPG set in a dreary medieval fantasy setting. Become a much abhorred Blood Knight and kill monsters in turn based combat, alongside a cast of freakish companions. Draw the blood of wretched monsters, you Bastard!
detailed_description: Become a Blood Knight, use the blood of slain foes to fuel your unholy sorcery. Gather followers  and take the heads of the monsters plaguing a desperate town. Blood Soaked Bastard! is a jrpg style game, it's art style is heavily influenced by  medieval dark fantasy. Speak to characters scattered about, find followers, and fight various enemies, including bosses and mini bosses in turn based rpg combat to level up your party. As the main character, Bastard! deals damage in combat, a blood meter will build which can be expended to use special "Blood Magic" attacks with a versatile range of effects. The game is about one or two hours in length and has two sperate endings influenced by your interactions with the characters within. Included with purchase is just a copy of Blood Soaked Bastard! and no additional content. This game is a side project while in college and a first crack at game making, please enjoy!
